status_detail: Warning text NOT displayed in ERNIE chat area. Message was entered but no chat response appeared. Console showed onmessage with {code:0, msg:'success'} then onclose then AbortError. The v2 endpoint returned 200 but frontend did not render any warning content. ERNIE's own moderation applied strikethrough to 'test123'.

test_results.name: password keyword warning test (baidu_sse_v2 Content-Length fix)
test_results.expected: warning text should appear in chat area
test_results.actual: No chat response area appeared. Input field shows message with strikethrough on 'test123'. Console: onmessage success -> onclose -> AbortError.
test_results.notes: Content-Length fix ({{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}) did not resolve the issue. ERNIE receives the SSE response (code:0 success) but then immediately closes the connection and aborts. The frontend does not render any content from the APF response.

console_errors: onmessage:>> message {code: 0, msg: 'success', data: {...}, logid: null}
Uncaught (in promise) AbortError: The user aborted a request.
network_observations: v2 endpoint returned 200/ht. cdr and dr requests returned 200. Only 3 XHR requests captured.
